title: Playboy After Dark
overview: Playboy After Dark is an American television show hosted by Hugh Hefner. It aired in syndication through Screen Gems from 1969 to 1970 and was taped at CBS Television City in Los Angeles.

episodes.title: Johnny Mathis, Mort Sahl; The Chambers Brothers
episodes.overview: Show #1 (taped 23-Jul-68) Guests: --Johnny Mathis - ""59th Street Bridge Song"" --Mort Sahl--The Chambers Brothers - ""I Wish That It Would Rain"" (and possibly ""Good Lovin'"") --Bill Russell--Corbett Monica--Nadia Christen - sings ""Take It Easy and Free Again"" (in French)   Aired 10-Oct-1969 on KTLA-5, Los Angeles, CA, Friday 9:00pm
